meta.title: Pie & AI Medellín: A Discussion with Andrew Ng and Helmuth Trefftz
meta.description: Andrew Ng and Helmuth Trefftz sit down during a Pie & AI meetup in Medellín, Colombia on August 22, 2019. Andrew explains why deeplearning.ai, Landing AI, and AI Fund chose to open their first international office in Medellín. He also discusses a government strategy for developing countries to harness AI and the future of deep learning technology.
